sentences.arabic: تَهْتَمُّ الدَّوْلَةُ بِتَحْسِينِ نِظَامِ الصِّحَّةِ وَالتَّعْلِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Država je zainteresovana za poboljšanje zdravstvenog i obrazovnog sistema.
sentences.translationEn: The state is interested in improving the health and education system.

sentences.arabic: بَنَتِ الحُكُومَةُ مَدَارِسَ حَدِيثَةً وَمُسْتَشْفَيَاتٍ كَبِيرَةً.
sentences.translation: Vlada je izgradila moderne škole i velike bolnice.
sentences.translationEn: The government built modern schools and large hospitals.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الأَطْفَالُ القِرَاءَةَ وَالكِتَابَةَ فِي سِنٍّ مُبَكِّرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Djeca uče čitati i pisati u ranom uzrastu.
sentences.translationEn: Children learn reading and writing at an early age.

sentences.arabic: أَيْضاً، تُقَدِّمُ العِيَادَاتُ خِدْمَاتٍ طِبِّيَّةً مَجَّانِيَّةً لِلْمُوَاطِنِينَ.
sentences.translation: Također, klinike pružaju besplatne medicinske usluge građanima.
sentences.translationEn: Also, clinics provide free medical services to citizens.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الخِدْمَاتُ تُسَاعِدُ فِي بِنَاءِ مُجْتَمَعٍ قَوِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Ove usluge pomažu u izgradnji snažnog društva.
sentences.translationEn: These services help in building a strong society.
